problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Synaptic. Synaptic plasticity modulation via NMDA receptor directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
